Spiny

Spiny is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is a common enemy and is often depicted as a small, red spiked creature that walks back and forth, posing a threat to Mario and his friends.

Spiny is known for his spiked shell and challenging behavior. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
